title: lundia cordata
intro: Lundia cordata, also known as the "heart-leaf Lundia," is a species of flowering plant in the family Bignoniaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lundia cordata include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, and acting as a natural remedy for gastrointestinal problems. Lundia cordata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction to utilize its medicinal properties.
